messages.subject: [R-sig-teaching] New Probability textbook with R
messages.body_plain:
Dear friends,

A new undergraduate probability textbook: Probability With Applications and R (Wiley 2013)
is now available.

One focus of the book is simulation. The book includes an R tutorial and example script files.

Here is the link to the book on Wiley's homepage:
http://www.wiley.com/WileyCDA/WileyTitle/productCd-1118241258.html


Bob Dobrow
Department of Mathematics
Carleton College
Northfield, MN
rdobrow at carleton.edu
